code: import{useMemo,useState}from'react';import ConfirmModal from'../components/common/ConfirmModal';import SOSButton from'../components/common/SOSButton';import{triggerSOS}from'../api/sos.api';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{useToast}from'../components/common/ToastProvider';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function SOS(){const{user}=useAuth();const{pushToast}=useToast();const[location,setLocation]=useState('');const[status,setStatus]=useState('idle');const[openConfirm,setOpenConfirm]=useState(false);const[sending,setSending]=useState(false);const timeline=useMemo(()=>{if(status==='idle')return['Waiting for SOS trigger'];if(status==='sent')return['SOS triggered','Dispatcher notified','Awaiting response'];return['SOS triggered','Help dispatched','Assistance reached'];},[status]);const detectLocation=()=>{if(!navigator.geolocation){pushToast('Geolocation is not supported in this browser.','warning');return;}navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(pos=>{setLocation("".concat(pos.coords.latitude.toFixed(5),", ").concat(pos.coords.longitude.toFixed(5)));pushToast('Location detected.','success');},()=>pushToast('Unable to fetch location. Enter manually.','danger'));};const handleTrigger=async()=>{try{setSending(true);await triggerSOS({userId:(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.id)||0,message:'Emergency SOS triggered',location:location||'Location not provided'});setStatus('sent');pushToast('SOS alert sent successfully.','success');setTimeout(()=>setStatus('active'),2500);}catch(_unused){pushToast('Could not send SOS.
